3207620.name: Rogue Raiders
3207620.description:
Rogue Raiders is a multiplayer action platformer. Jump through dungeons while collecting loot and avoiding monsters and traps. Each round starts with the players placing down traps, monsters and equipment. Then you compete against each other by platforming and wall jumping through the dungeons, avoiding damage and collecting loot. The winner is whoever takes less damage and collects most treasures.

Demo does not include online play but can be played with Steam Remote Play Together.

Full game features:

  • Local and online multiplayer.

  • Remote play together.

  • Parkour platforming with double jump and wall jumping.

  • Many interactive stages with unique hazards and themes.

  • Many placeable traps, items and monsters.

  • Power-ups like grappling hook, gripper, wings and daggers.

  • Multiple game modes like loot rush, survival and trials.

  • More settings to customize each game.

  • Skill balancing.
